items.name: SOFI TUKKER Toast Necklace
items.description: Celebrate the release of SOFI TUKKER's new album - BREAD, with this toast charm necklace. This gold chain choker is a tasteful addition to any ensemble, this piece will make you feel like the upper crust of fashion 🍞 Pair it with the SOFI TUKKER Bread Suit Jacket & Shorts.
